title: AI Workforce Build State
description: Tracks the post-interview build of every department + role so the build can be autonomously resumed if an agent session is interrupted. Lives at /data/.openclaw/workspace/.workforce-build-state.json (VPS) or ~/.openclaw/workspace/.workforce-build-state.json (Mac). Written by the agent at interview-completion AND after every unit of build work completes.

ownerChat.description: Owner Telegram chat ID for final status message

buildPid.description: Optional lock token to prevent concurrent builds

filesPlanned.description: Expected file list (e.g. README.md, AGENTS.md, SOUL.md, TOOLS.md, USER.md, MEMORY.md, HEARTBEAT.md)

openItems.description: Free-form notes about post-build cleanup, e.g. 'Vertical Pack confirmation pending', 'HITMCN merger decision pending'

resumeAttempts.description: Count of autonomous resume invocations. Capped at maxResumeAttempts to prevent infinite loops.

maxResumeAttempts.description: Hard cap. After this, resume-workforce-build.sh stops self-pinging and notifies Trevor instead of the owner.
